positive: A mystical, ethereal forest scene viewed through a semi-transparent, geometric hexagonal window. The central subject is a pair of whimsical, stylized woodland creatures—a bioluminescent fox and a majestic owl—perched on intertwined root structures. The scene must feature a strong contrast between deep indigo/sapphire blue shadows and bright neon teal/lime green glowing elements. Composition should be symmetrical and centered, emphasizing strong silhouettes against a gradient background. Style: Neo-art nouveau mixed with mystical gothic linework. Perfect for screen printing on clothing. Highly detailed, clean lines, vector graphic quality, concept art, maximalism.
